case_title: MARGUERITE RIGOGLIOSO VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIGOGLIOSO, MARGUERITE AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIGOGLIOSO, MARGUERITE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $3.74 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $833.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
